advancement.moderndelight.acdcc.desc: Make an AC/DC converter which will convert these two types of power with losses.
advancement.moderndelight.acdcc.title: AC & DC
advancement.moderndelight.bamboo_steamer: Get ready to build a traditional steamer with a bamboo steamer basket drawer, bamboo steamer cover, and cauldron!
advancement.moderndelight.battery1.desc: Make a simple battery, which is the beginning of all power storage.
advancement.moderndelight.battery1.title: Introduction to Electricity Storage
advancement.moderndelight.battery2.desc: Make an intermediate battery and you'll be able to store more power again!
advancement.moderndelight.battery2.title: Advanced Power Storage
advancement.moderndelight.battery3.desc: Make an advance battery which can really store lots and lots of electricity!
advancement.moderndelight.battery3.title: I need more electricity!
advancement.moderndelight.battery4.desc: Make a dimensional battery, now you don't have to worry about storing power anymore!
advancement.moderndelight.battery4.title: King of the Power Storage
advancement.moderndelight.bdc_bdi.desc: Craft a biogas digester controller and a biogas digester I/O port. Remember to read their instructions and build your biogas digester!
advancement.moderndelight.bdc_bdi.title: Biogas Industry
Make a charging post which can charge a DC appliances!
advancement.moderndelight.cooked_portabl: Add packaged instant noodles, quicklime and water to a portable pot and have a quick go at cooking some instant noodles.
Make a Cuisine Table, with the top slot for tools and the bottom slot for items, you can break down a lot of items.
advancement.moderndelight.deep_fry_baske: Remember to use a tongs to get items out of the deep fryer, beware of fryer killers!
advancement.moderndelight.deep_fryer.des: Right click to put in oil or take out or deposit an item, sneak and right click to see its status. It must be oiled and have a gas canister connection in order to work
advancement.moderndelight.electric_steam: An electric steamer allows you to get rid of the complexity of building a traditional steamer.
advancement.moderndelight.electric_whisk: Regular whisk with glass bowl is too slow to mix manually? Try an electric whisk! It works directly on drops!
advancement.moderndelight.electricians_d: Make an electrician's desk, and it'll be with you for a long time to come.
advancement.moderndelight.filter.desc: Putting filters and stir-fried oil crops (like sunflower seeds) into wooden basin and pressing the oil with feet on the basin
advancement.moderndelight.filter.title: Beginning of a life of labor
advancement.moderndelight.fish_and_chips: Make a portion of fish and chips, excellent!
Deep fry some noodles and try making some instant noodles in honey comb and paper composite bags.
advancement.moderndelight.garlic.desc: Find garlic in villagers' houses or in the forest.
advancement.moderndelight.garlic.title: The vampire's pet hate
advancement.moderndelight.gas_canister.d: It can either load gas from the biogas digester I/O port or supply gas to a gas cooking stove. Remember to be safe though!
advancement.moderndelight.gas_cooking_st: Gas cooking stove can heat a lot of things, including yourself
advancement.moderndelight.get_advance_fu: Craft an advanced furnace, which is 4 times faster than a normal furnace!
advancement.moderndelight.get_all_mousse: Put the mousse (WIP) in the middle slot of the freezer, and put the corresponding ingredients on both sides, and you will get real mousse.
advancement.moderndelight.get_all_puddin: Put the baked pudding in the middle slot of the freezer, and put the corresponding ingredients on both sides, and you will get real pudding.
advancement.moderndelight.get_baking_tra: It can be placed inside an advanced furnace to upgrade your furnace to oven.
advancement.moderndelight.get_black_pepp: Discovery of new crops in villagers' homes or jungle.
advancement.moderndelight.get_butter_des: Put the cream in a glass bowl and whisk with a whisk to obtain the butter.
advancement.moderndelight.get_cheese.des: Put the milk in the oven to cook.
advancement.moderndelight.get_cream_buck: Put the milk bucket in a glass bowl and whisk with a whisk to obtain the cream bucket.
advancement.moderndelight.get_crowbar.de: An awesome tool alright? You can right-click to demote the oven as well as right-click to quickly destroy doors and windows. Just remember, don't hit anyone with it.
advancement.moderndelight.get_egg_tart_d: Sequentially place the cream, mixed dough, egg and sugar in the oven to make the tart.
advancement.moderndelight.get_freezer_de: It's time to let the ingredients cool down a bit, and this freezer can cold process quite a few things!
advancement.moderndelight.get_glass_bowl: Be careful not to break the bowl.
advancement.moderndelight.get_kneading_s: It's just an ordinary wooden stick.
advancement.moderndelight.get_mashed_pot: Put the potato in a glass bowl and whisk with a whisk to obtain the mashed potato.
advancement.moderndelight.get_mousse_wip: Follow the advancement, I believe you will make the mousse.
advancement.moderndelight.get_netherite_: Craft a netherite whisk or get out of the kitchen.
advancement.moderndelight.get_oven_desc: The oven will help you bake better food.
advancement.moderndelight.get_pizza.desc: Place in the oven in the order of black pepper dust, sugar, black pepper dust, raw pizza.
advancement.moderndelight.get_potato_sta: Put the mashed potato in a glass bowl and whisk with a whisk to obtain the potato starch.
advancement.moderndelight.get_pudding_wi: Follow the advancement, I believe you will make the pudding.
First, add the cheese to the flattened dough, then add 5 of your favorite ingredients and finish with a cheese.
Getting ready to open a pizzeria!
advancement.moderndelight.get_start_desc: After eating this piece of bread, does it seem too mediocre? It's time to prepare some brand new food!
advancement.moderndelight.get_wheat_doug: Pour the water into a glass bowl, add the wheat flour and turn it into a dough! You can roll out with a kneading stick and flatten it, or you can go bake bread.
advancement.moderndelight.get_wheat_flou: Whisk wheat to obtain the wheat flour.
advancement.moderndelight.get_whisk_desc: Craft a whisk to start your new kitchen journey.
advancement.moderndelight.get_whisk_titl: The truth is it's a whisk
advancement.moderndelight.ice_cream.desc: Witness an ice cream being made!
advancement.moderndelight.ice_cream_make: Make an ice cream maker. When you take out the ice cream, you can definitely double your excitement!
advancement.moderndelight.juice_extracto: Make a juice extractor and make some drinks with it!
advancement.moderndelight.kebabs.desc: Grill a squid tentacle kebab. It's delicious and healthy.
advancement.moderndelight.kebabs.title: Have a Kebab
advancement.moderndelight.kuh.title: Beautify the kitchen
advancement.moderndelight.matcha.title: Sweet Smell
advancement.moderndelight.pg.desc: Make a photovoltaic generator that's portable and eco-friendly
advancement.moderndelight.pg.title: Environmentally Friendly
Smelting quartz in a blast furnace to obtain silicon ingots
advancement.moderndelight.spatula.desc: Heat up a baking tray on the burning gas cooking stove, then add ingredients to it and stir-fry with a spatula.
advancement.moderndelight.spatula.title: It's stir-fry time!
advancement.moderndelight.steamed_bun.de: Take the dough directly to the steamer and make a steamed bun.
advancement.moderndelight.stone_mortar.d: Make a stone mortar which will help you crush some things.
advancement.moderndelight.tesla_coil.des: Make a Tesla coil, which will allow you to get rid of the wires and solve the transmission troubles!
advancement.moderndelight.thermal_power_: Make a Stirling Engine and Faraday Generator, mount the Stirling Engine on any working furnace, connect the flywheel which is a part of the Stirling Engine to the Faraday Generator, and start mass-producing electricity!
Congratulations, you're not far from deep-frying food.
advancement.moderndelight.wind.desc: Make a fan blade and a wind turbine controller and start feeling the power from nature!
advancement.moderndelight.wind.title: The Wind is Passing by
advancement.moderndelight.wither_rose_ca: Eat the wither rose cake, then think about your life.
advancement.moderndelight.wooden_basin.d: Apparently it's a tool for extracting oil.
moderndelight.cuisine_table.cant_open: The Cuisine Table is occupied by other player and cannot be opened.
moderndelight.deep_fryer_message.need_oi: You need to add cooking oil to it.
moderndelight.deep_fryer_message.too_hot: It's too hot! Please hold the tongs to remove the items
moderndelight.freezer_message.fail_to_op: The freezer door is blocked by a block.
moderndelight.glass_bowl_message.need_pa: The contents require special items to be removed, need
moderndelight.glass_bowl_message.whisk_f: This thing doesn't seem to be able to be handled by the whisk.
moderndelight.ice_cream_maker.need_cone: Please use an ice cream cone to pick up the ice cream.
moderndelight.ice_cream_maker.need_selec: Please select a flavor in the GUI screen or insufficient ice cream left.
moderndelight.juice_extractor_message.is: Please remove the juice from the juice extractor first. Need
moderndelight.juice_extractor_message.no: Not enough energy to start the juice extractor.
moderndelight.juice_extractor_message.wr: Juicing operation cannot be performed on inserted items.
moderndelight.msg.electric_whisk.need_bo: This item can only be processed by matching the glass bowl!
moderndelight.pizza_message.need_cheese: You need to put a cheese here.
moderndelight.pizza_message.need_ingredi: You need to put a proper ingredient here.
moderndelight.tooltips.acdcc: A device that converts DC and AC power freely, in the "AC->DC" mode, converts AC to DC and caches when connected to any AC power generator, batteries can be plugged in and charged, in the "DC->AC" mode, it can convert cached DC power or DC power from internal battery into AC power and output it, its efficiency can be adjusted in the GUI. It can also be used for FE/RF/AE conversion.
moderndelight.tooltips.baking_tray: A small, easy-to-use iron plate that can be used for upgrading an Advanced Furnace or for stir-frying: with a Gas Cooking Stove underneath it to heat it up, place the food on top of it and use a spatula to stir-fry it five times to cook the food.
moderndelight.tooltips.bamboo_steamer: A simple bamboo steamer, requires a cover, basket drawers, and a gas cooking stove heated cauldron filled with water, add the ingredients and it will start the process, a Steamer can be stacked 3 blocks high, each block can hold 4 layers.
moderndelight.tooltips.bdc: It is the core component that makes up the biogas digester, and when a flat and completely sealed cuboid area exists underneath it, it will automatically recognize this area as the digester.
moderndelight.tooltips.bdi: It will be activated when it is a working biogas digester controller underneath it, at which point you just need to fill it with any food to start fermenting it to produce biogas. If a gas canister attached to the side of it, it will allow you to fill the gas canister with biogas.
moderndelight.tooltips.butter: Sticky texture...Maybe it's used for something other than food.
moderndelight.tooltips.charging_post: A device that can charge DC appliances, after right clicking to open the GUI, the left two slot are battery placement slots where you can place at least one battery, and the right slot is for the DC appliance to be charged.
moderndelight.tooltips.condiment_tip: Seasoning item, hold this in one hand and any food in the other hand to season the food.
moderndelight.tooltips.cuisine_table: The cuisine table allows you to deepen the ingredients and use it with a tool that breaks down the ingredients into more parts.
moderndelight.tooltips.cuttlebone: It can be dropped when a squid killed by an amethyst tool.
moderndelight.tooltips.deep_fryer: A deep fryer can be used to deep fry a variety of foods. Pour in cooking oil and it will start to consume the gas and heat up, place a Gas Canister at the back of the fryer, then press the button on the front of the fryer, then add the food to it to start frying, hold down Shift and right-click on the fryer to check its detailed status.
moderndelight.tooltips.electric_steamer: Like a regular steamer, but it consumes AC power to heat the water and can only process 12 ingredients at once, it has the advantage of taking up little space and does not require additional heating equipment.
moderndelight.tooltips.electric_whisk: Like a regular whisk, it can be used with a glass bowl to enable whisking of food, but it will consume DC power and you will need a charging post to charge it. In addition, it is also effective to the drops on the ground.
moderndelight.tooltips.electricians_desk: The electrician's desk allows you to synthesize and process some complex circuit components or appliances, after placing the material correctly into the desk, click on the output button that appears in the GUI to start the synthesis. There are 3 different types of mini-games: 1. 2048 (by pressing WASD to synthesize the specified number); 2. Splicing of the circuit board (reproduce the pattern of the "?" screen, the screwdriver can remove the pattern); 3. Hanno's Tower (just move the left tower to the right, narrow blocks can only be placed on wide blocks); Finish the mini-game and then press that output button again to get the finished product.
moderndelight.tooltips.failed_seasoning: You can't add more seasoning to this food.
moderndelight.tooltips.fan_blade: A fan blade for wind power generation, which can be mounted on the wind turbine controller or placed elsewhere for decorative purposes, its rotation speed depends on the current altitude and weather conditions.
moderndelight.tooltips.faraday_generator: When properly mounted behind the flywheel of a Stirling engine, AC power is generated, be sure that the flywheel of the Stirling engine and the generator must look like they are just able to be connected in order to generate power.
moderndelight.tooltips.filter: A filter made of string that can be placed in a wooden basin to filter oil and slags.
moderndelight.tooltips.freezer: A simple freezer, which can be used for storing items or cold processing some ingredients, can be cooled by consuming some refrigerants, such as ice, or by directly consuming AC electricity.
moderndelight.tooltips.gas_cooking_stove: When it is flanked by a gas canister containing gas, right-click to activate it, and when activated, it can heat up the block above it, including baking tray, oven, and advance furnace, all of which are compatible.
moderndelight.tooltips.glass_bowl: A container for processing and whisking ingredients that needs to be used with a whisk, water can also be poured into it for "mixing with water".
moderndelight.tooltips.holder: For safe and harmless removal of the contents of the Deep Fryer, you can also press sneak and right click to transfer items between different containers. Right clicking allows you to remove a clamped item. Right clicking while not clamping an item allows you to clamp an item held in your other hand.
moderndelight.tooltips.ice_cream_maker: Hold down Shift and right click to open the GUI screen, put any flavor of cream, sugar and eggs in it and provide AC power to start working, the different flavors of ice cream made will be stored in it, after checking the flavors you want to mix, hold the ice cream cone and right click on it to take out the ice cream.
moderndelight.tooltips.juice_extractor: A juice extractor that can be used for extracting juice, it can be used by switching on the AC power, right clicking on the juice extractor while holding the item to be extracted to put it into it, right clicking on the juice extractor again after putting in the two items to start the machine.
moderndelight.tooltips.need_food: You need to hold any food in your other hand.
moderndelight.tooltips.p_gen: A photovoltaic generator converts light energy into DC electrical energy and stores it, batteries can be plugged in and charged, and the amount of power generated depends on factors such as current altitude, time of day, weather, block light and sky light.
moderndelight.tooltips.spatula: It can be used with a heated tray to stir-fry foods.
moderndelight.tooltips.sterling_engine: The Stirling engine needed to be mounted on a burning furnace, blast furnace, smoker, advanced furnace or oven to work, and it need connecting to a Faraday generator to produce AC Power.Using a sponge makes it less noisy.
moderndelight.tooltips.tesla_coil: The Tesla Coil can transmit AC power remotely, and when placed on a device that generates AC power it spreads the power over an area of 8 blocks to the the east, south, west, north, up, and down, and you can turn on the visualization button in the GUI to visualize this 48 blocks area, and the AC appliances and other Tesla Coils within the area are energized, and mob that get too close to an energized Tesla Coil can receive an electric shock that can damage them.
moderndelight.tooltips.truffle: It can be found in podzol.
moderndelight.tooltips.turnip: A slight grudge from the author.
moderndelight.tooltips.whisk: A whisk that can be used to mix ingredients, or... whisk the brains of monsters?
moderndelight.tooltips.wooden_basin: A Wooden Basin that can be used to extract vegetable oil, put in an oil crop (e.g. stir-fried sunflower seeds) and a filter, then stand on it and jump to extract the oil, you can use a glass bottle or a bucket to take out the oil.
moderndelight.tooltips.wooden_plate: A plate that can be used to display items, right click to place items on it, sneak and right click to rotate the items on it.
moderndelight.tooltips.wtc: When the fan blade are properly installed, the controller will begin to operate and generate AC power, the amount of power generated depends on the current altitude and weather conditions.
config.moderndelight.biogasSystem.title: Biogas System Config
config.moderndelight.option.acdcConverte: Modification of the max work speed of AC/DC converter.
config.moderndelight.option.allowGasCani: When this option is enabled, a gas canister may explode if there is a ‘Danger Block’ next to it, and the gas canister may also explode if it is overfilled with gas.
Allow Normal Use of Gas Canister in the Nether
When this option is enabled, the gas canister will be allowed to function normally in the Nether without exploding.
config.moderndelight.option.chargingPost: Modification of the energy power conversion efficiency of Charging Post.
FE Conversion Efficiency of Charging Post
config.moderndelight.option.digestate.de: Modification of the composition of the digestate produced by the biogas digester input and output. The Namespaced identifier of the item is required here.
config.moderndelight.option.energyGenera: Modification of the energy power generated by Faraday generator.
config.moderndelight.option.maxSeasoning: Set the maximum amount of seasoning you can add to a food.
config.moderndelight.option.photovoltaic: Multiplier for FE Generated by Photovoltaic Generator
Modification of the multiplier for energy power produced by photovoltaic generator.
config.moderndelight.option.teslaCoilCon: FE Conversion Efficiency of Tesla Coil
Modification of the energy power conversion efficiency of Tesla coil.
config.moderndelight.option.windTurbineM: Multiplier for FE Generated by Wind Turbine
Modification of the multiplier for energy power produced by wind turbine.
config.moderndelight.powerSystem.title: Power System Config
config.moderndelight.seasoning.title: Flavouring System Config
config.moderndelight.title: Modern Delight Config
effect.moderndelight.sticky.description: Drastically reduces movement speed while being unable to jump.
The stone mortar will have additional output when grinding.
item.moderndelight.vegetable_steamed_stu: Vegetable Steamed Stuffed Bun (Work In Progress)

modmenu.descriptionTranslation.moderndel: Allow Minecraft to have a more enriched way of processing ingredients.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.moderndelight: A more modern approach to ingredients.
patchouli.moderndelight.book.landing_tex: Introducing you: Modern Delight. This book will show you how to play this mod better.
patchouli.moderndelight.book.name: Modern Delight Guide
